_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill it in. config.json is git-ignored and stays only on your PC.
_loginUrl_note: The page where you normally sign in to Apna as an employer. You log in here ONCE, by hand (password + OTP). After that the bot reuses the saved session. >>> CONFIRM THIS URL from your address bar. <<<
_intervalHours_note: How often to pull new applicants. 6 = four times a day. Set 0 to run once and exit.
_selectAllTabSelector_note: Clicked before exporting so we download EVERY applicant, not just the 'Action Pending' subset. Leave as-is unless the tab is named differently.
_exportButtonSelector_note: Confirmed from the applicants page screenshot — the 'Download Excel' button.

jobs.label: PUT THE APNA JOB NAME HERE

_jobs_note: One entry per Apna job to sync. 'ourJobId' = the job's ID in this recruitment system. 'applicantsUrl' = the web address shown in your browser when you are on that job's applicant list (the page with the Download Excel button).
